'''âs-j-z''' ('''kasajaz''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unarrest|unarrest]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| s-j-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unarrest|unarrest]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âs-j-z
|-
! Lemma
| kasajaz
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thisajaz|thisajaz]] || [[word:jisajaz|jisajaz]] || [[word:shisajaz|shisajaz]] || [[word:kisajaz|kisajaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthusajaz|thuthusajaz]] || [[word:jujusajaz|jujusajaz]] || [[word:shushusajaz|shushusajaz]] || [[word:kukusajaz|kukusajaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thusajaz|thusajaz]] || [[word:jusajaz|jusajaz]] || [[word:shusajaz|shusajaz]] || [[word:kusajaz|kusajaz]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thusajaz|thusajaz]] || [[word:jusajaz|jusajaz]] || [[word:shusajaz|shusajaz]] || [[word:kusajaz|kusajaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thesajaz|thesajaz]] || [[word:jesajaz|jesajaz]] || [[word:shesajaz|shesajaz]] || [[word:kesajaz|kesajaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothosajaz|thothosajaz]] || [[word:jojosajaz|jojosajaz]] || [[word:shoshosajaz|shoshosajaz]] || [[word:kokosajaz|kokosajaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thosajaz|thosajaz]] || [[word:josajaz|josajaz]] || [[word:shosajaz|shosajaz]] || [[word:kosajaz|kosajaz]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thosajaz|thosajaz]] || [[word:josajaz|josajaz]] || [[word:shosajaz|shosajaz]] || [[word:kosajaz|kosajaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠsajaz|thĂŠsajaz]] || [[word:jĂŠsajaz|jĂŠsajaz]] || [[word:shĂŠsajaz|shĂŠsajaz]] || [[word:kĂŠsajaz|kĂŠsajaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathasajaz|thathasajaz]] || [[word:jajasajaz|jajasajaz]] || [[word:shashasajaz|shashasajaz]] || [[word:kakasajaz|kakasajaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thasajaz|thasajaz]] || [[word:jasajaz|jasajaz]] || [[word:shasajaz|shasajaz]] || [[word:kasajaz|kasajaz]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thasajaz|thasajaz]] || [[word:jasajaz|jasajaz]] || [[word:shasajaz|shasajaz]] || [[word:kasajaz|kasajaz]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shasajaz|shasajaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshasajaz|goshasajaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishasajaz|gokishasajaz]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shasajaznĂŒ|shasajaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshasajaznknĂŒ|goshasajaznknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajaznĂŒ|gokishasajaznĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shasajazshĂ«|shasajazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshasajaznkshĂ«|goshasajaznkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishasajazshĂ«|gokishasajazshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajazro|shasajazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajaznkro|goshasajaznkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajazro|gokishasajazro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajazmu|shasajazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajaznkmu|goshasajaznkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajazmu|gokishasajazmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shasajazsher|shasajazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshasajaznksher|goshasajaznksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishasajazsher|gokishasajazsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shasajazng|shasajazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshasajaznkng|goshasajaznkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishasajazng|gokishasajazng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shasajazya|shasajazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshasajaznkya|goshasajaznkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishasajazya|gokishasajazya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shasajazyam|shasajazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshasajaznkyam|goshasajaznkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishasajazyam|gokishasajazyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajaznĂŒshĂ«|shasajaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajaznknĂŒshĂ«|goshasajaznknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajaznĂŒshĂ«|gokishasajaznĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajaznĂŒro|shasajaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajaznknĂŒro|goshasajaznknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajaznĂŒro|gokishasajaznĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajaznĂŒmu|shasajaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajaznknĂŒmu|goshasajaznknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajaznĂŒmu|gokishasajaznĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajazshĂ«nĂŒ|shasajazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajaznkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshasajaznkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajazshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishasajazshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajazshĂ«ro|shasajazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajaznkshĂ«ro|goshasajaznkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajazshĂ«ro|gokishasajazshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajazshĂ«mu|shasajazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajaznkshĂ«mu|goshasajaznkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajazshĂ«mu|gokishasajazshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajazronĂŒ|shasajazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajaznkronĂŒ|goshasajaznkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajazronĂŒ|gokishasajazronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajazroshĂ«|shasajazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajaznkroshĂ«|goshasajaznkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajazroshĂ«|gokishasajazroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shasajazromu|shasajazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshasajaznkromu|goshasajaznkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishasajazromu|gokishasajazromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shasajazmunĂŒ|shasajazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshasajaznkmunĂŒ|goshasajaznkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishasajazmunĂŒ|gokishasajazmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shasajazmushĂ«|shasajazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshasajaznkmushĂ«|goshasajaznkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishasajazmushĂ«|gokishasajazmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shasajazmuro|shasajazmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshasajaznkmuro|goshasajaznkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishasajazmuro|gokishasajazmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
